finding_results.evidence: Receptionist warning cadence is now clipped/procedural at chapters/chapter_11.md:203, chapters/chapter_11.md:207, and chapters/chapter_11.md:519, while Keane's warning cadence is now body-specific imperative chaining at chapters/chapter_11.md:551 and chapters/chapter_11.md:561.
finding_results.notes: Removed the repeated symptom-list + imperative template across the receptionist and Keane scenes; preserved receptionist protocol diction and shifted Keane to embodied urgency with distinct lexical/rhythmic markers.

summary: Updated chapter 11 warning-dialogue clusters to enforce voice separation: receptionists remain procedural and scripted, Keane now uses a distinct body-risk imperative register under pressure.
